flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Hohenwald fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (444 → 346).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 20 pp at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Hohenwald vs the 2003–2007 baseline (50.0% vs 69.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Hohenwald fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (84.8% → 71.7%).
